zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume de Dampierre IV,  Seigneur of Flanders於1260年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登奧布特洛也斯時，他的父親Guy de Dampierre35歲，母親Mathilde de Béthune31歲。他和Alix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISIS至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1311年在法國哈帕格-亞登豪-馬內達皮享年51歲，埋葬在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德度華奧爾斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume de Dampierre IV,  Seigneur of Flanders于1260年出生在法国哈帕格-亞登奧布特洛也斯时，他的父亲Guy de Dampierre35岁，母亲Mathilde de Béthune31岁。他和Alix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISIS至少有3个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1311年在法国哈帕格-亞登豪-馬內達皮享年51岁，埋葬在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德度華奧爾斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume de Dampierre IV,  Seigneur of Flanders was born in 1260, in Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France, his father, Guy de Dampierre, was 35 and his mother, Mathilde de Béthune, was 31. He had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with Alix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISIS. He died in 1311, in Dampierre, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, at the age of 51, and was buried in Orchies, Douai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume de Dampierre IV,  Seigneur of Flanders est né en 1260, à Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Guy de Dampierre, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Mathilde de Béthune, avait 31 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles avec Alix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISIS. Il est décédé en 1311, à Dampierre, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Orchies, Douai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume de Dampierre IV,  Seigneur of Flanders 1260 in Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guy de Dampierre 35 und seine Mutter Mathilde de Béthune 31. Er hatte mit Alix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISIS mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1311 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Dampierre, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich und wurde in Orchies, Douai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume de Dampierre IV,  Seigneur of Flanders è nato il nel 1260 nel Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, il suo padre, Guy de Dampierre, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde de Béthune, aveva 31 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie con Alix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISIS. Morì nel 1311, nel Dampierre, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Orchies, Douai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Dampierre IV,  Seigneur of Flandersが1260年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアウベトロイスで生まれた時，父Guy de Dampierreは35歳，母Mathilde de Béthuneは31歳であった。彼はAlix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISISとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1311年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンハウテ-マルンダンパエアで51歳で死去し，フランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードドウアイオルチスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Dampierre IV,  Seigneur of Flanders(이)가 1260년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 오브 트로예스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guy de Dampierre(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde de Béthune(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Alix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISIS(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1311년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 하테-마니 댐피르에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 다아이 오치스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume de Dampierre IV,  Seigneur of Flanders nasceu em 1260, em Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Guy de Dampierre, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde de Béthune, tinha 31 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas com Alix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISIS. Ele faleceu em 1311, em Dampierre, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Orchies, Douai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume de Dampierre IV,  Seigneur of Flanders родился в 1260 г. в местности троиесь, ауб, чампагне-арденн, Франция, его отцу по имени Guy de Dampierre было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde de Béthune, 31. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от Alix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISIS. Он умер в 1311 г. в местности дампьирр, хауте-марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности орчиесь, доуеи, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume de Dampierre IV,  Seigneur of Flanders nació en 1260, en Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Guy de Dampierre, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Mathilde de Béthune, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas con Alix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISIS. Murió en 1311, en Dampierre, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Orchies, Douai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.
